'''yathugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jigitovka|jigitovka]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-th-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jigitovka|jigitovka]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yathugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæthigith|yæthigith]] || [[word:yæthigij|yæthigij]] || [[word:yæthigish|yæthigish]] || [[word:yæthigi|yæthigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yathuthuguth|yathuthuguth]] || [[word:yathuthuguj|yathuthuguj]] || [[word:yathuthugush|yathuthugush]] || [[word:yathuthugu|yathuthugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yathuguth|yathuguth]] || [[word:yathuguj|yathuguj]] || [[word:yathugush|yathugush]] || [[word:yathugu|yathugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yathufgufth|yathufgufth]] || [[word:yathufgufj|yathufgufj]] || [[word:yathufgufsh|yathufgufsh]] || [[word:yathufguf|yathufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yathuguthu|yathuguthu]] || [[word:yathuguju|yathuguju]] || [[word:yathugushu|yathugushu]] || [[word:yathuguku|yathuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yathuguth|yathuguth]] || [[word:yathuguj|yathuguj]] || [[word:yathugush|yathugush]] || [[word:yathugu|yathugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yathuguthul|yathuguthul]] || [[word:yathugujul|yathugujul]] || [[word:yathugushul|yathugushul]] || [[word:yathugukul|yathugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yathuguuthuthu|yathuguuthuthu]] || [[word:yathuguujuju|yathuguujuju]] || [[word:yathuguushushu|yathuguushushu]] || [[word:yathuguuku|yathuguuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yathuguthun|yathuguthun]] || [[word:yathugujun|yathugujun]] || [[word:yathugushun|yathugushun]] || [[word:yathugukun|yathugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yathuguthuoro|yathuguthuoro]] || [[word:yathugujuoro|yathugujuoro]] || [[word:yathugushuoro|yathugushuoro]] || [[word:yathugukuoro|yathugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|effa290}}
